title: Pull Apart Pizza Bread
ingredients: 2 cans of Pillsbury Pizza dough or biscuits
instructions:
Spray a 10” pizza pan with cooking spray and place a small dipping sauce bowl in the center.
In a large bowl, combine the mozzarella, pepperoni, parmesan, basil, parsley and oregano.
In a whisk bowl, stir together the olive oil and garlic. Add to the cheese mixture.
Cut the dough into 2” pieces and toss them with the cheese mixture. Place the dough (in multiple layers) around the sauce bowl on the pizza pan.
Bake for 30-45 minutes or until the biscuits have browned. If the top biscuits begin to brown earlier than the rest, gently lay a piece of foil over the top.
While the bread is baking, heat the pizza sauce.
